All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

C

cB - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.DeleteItemTab
ComboBox used for selecting a Game entity to delete.
cB - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.UpdateItemTab
ComboBox used to select an existing Game to update.
chart - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.StatisticsTab
PieChart used to visualize game distribution based on selected grouping criteria.
clearFields() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.AddItemTab
Resets all input fields and selection controls after a successful submission.
clearFields() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.UpdateItemTab
Clears all editable input fields in the form.
COLS - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.ViewItemTab
Column headers used for rendering the table layout.
columnWidth(int) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Returns a predefined column width based on column index mapping.
CONFIG_FILE - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConfig
Path to the properties file used for storing database configuration.
connection - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
Active SQL database connection used throughout the application.
container - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.ViewItemTab
Container holding all rendered rows (header + data rows).
create(Stage) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.LoginScene
Creates the login scene for database authentication.
CREATE_TABLE_DEVELOPER - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
SQL table creation statement for developers table.
CREATE_TABLE_GAMES - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
SQL table creation statement for games table.
CREATE_TABLE_PLATFORM - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConst
SQL table creation statement for platforms table.
createTable(String, String) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
Creates a database table if it does not already exist.
